text:
Once upon a time, in a town named Whiskerburgh, lived a little chameleon named Chip. Chip had five spots on hisTail, which he often swapped around to express various emotions.

One sunny morning, Chip woke up feeling unusually sad. He didn’t know why; perhaps it was because his favorite lettuce leaf had just turned green. He decided to visit Miss Lavender, known for her soothing flowers and great listening ear.

As Chip approached her garden, he noticed she wasn’t there. Instead, a frog sat on a lily pad.

"Frog?" Chip asked cautiously.

"Why, yes! Hop into my pond and tell me what's bothering you," she replied.

Chip told her all about his melancholy. The frog chuckled and clambered into the water.

"You have many lovely spots," he remarked playfully. "Why are they always on tides?"

"I… I don’t know," Chip confessed. "Maybe I’m just feeling out of sync with the ocean
